name: Transmission
tagline: Fast, easy, and free BitTorrent client.
description:
Fast, easy, and free BitTorrent client.

Docs: https://docs.linuxserver.io/images/docker-transmission/?utm_source=coolify.io

_Template derived from coollabsio/coolify (coolify@e7dff30, Apache-2.0). Default credentials are generated per-app — check the compose environment values._
docker_compose:
services:
  transmission:
    image: lscr.io/linuxserver/transmission:latest
    environment:
      - PUID=1000
      - PGID=1000
      - USER=ud9187d6022
      - PASS=cd5e3822998dad94eec51d0fbcd4b4a2
    volumes:
      - transmission-config:/config
      - transmission-downloads:/downloads
      - transmission-watch:/watch
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD
        - curl
        - -sSfL
        - -u
        - ud9187d6022:cd5e3822998dad94eec51d0fbcd4b4a2
        - http://localhost:9091/
      interval: 30s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 3
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - 42127:9091
volumes:
  transmission-config: null
  transmission-downloads: null
  transmission-watch: null
